Build a canonical D589 application-decision committed fact.

## Import

```ts
import { agenticMemoryCommittedApplicationDecisionFact } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function agenticMemoryCommittedApplicationDecisionFact(
	decision: AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationDecision<TJson>,
	opts: {
		readonly sourceRefs?: readonly AgenticMemoryFactRef[];
		readonly correlationId?: string;
		readonly causationId?: string;
		readonly scope?: readonly string[];
	} = {},
): AgenticMemoryCommittedFact<TJson>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `decision` | `AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationDecision<TJson>` | Graph-visible application decision DATA. |
| `opts` | `{ 		readonly sourceRefs?: readonly AgenticMemoryFactRef[]; 		readonly correlationId?: string; 		readonly causationId?: string; 		readonly scope?: readonly string[]; 	}` | Optional source/correlation coordinates. |

## Returns

A committed application-decision fact.
